Name:
Yeat - As We Speak
(feat. Drake) prod. Caleb Bryant)
(Tenochtitlan)
Notes:
OG Filename: Tenochtitlan
FLP of an early rendition of the "As We Speak" instrumental on Phase 2 of 2093. Filename previewed by one of the coproducers of the song, @calebbryant_, in an Instagram story captioned "I remember the night I made this,new it could be something crazy" on February 17, 2024. Made in December 2023, as the file dating says "modified 2 months ago".
